summary: The implementation fails to resolve the persistent bandit:B607 finding across all attempts. The final code uses 'sh -c' with a command string and insufficient escaping, violating the requirement to avoid shell injection and not passing the CSV file path as an argument.
suggested_actions: Replace subprocess.run(['sh', '-c', ...]) with subprocess.run(['command', report_path]) using a list of arguments and no shell invocation
Pass the CSV file path as a separate argument to the command instead of relying on shell string manipulation
Ensure the command is validated against a whitelist of allowed executables to prevent arbitrary command execution

evidence.description: Starting a process with a partial executable path
